title: chamaecrista lineata
intro: Chamaecrista lineata, also known as sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing antioxidant protection. Chamaecrista lineata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
